title: Authenticate to the API
description: Walks developers through generating OAuth 2.0 credentials and exchanging them for an access token, including request examples, response fields, and error codes.

title: Understand vector databases
description: Explains how vector databases store and index high-dimensional data for semantic similarity search, covering vectorization, indexing algorithms, and common use cases like RAG and recommendation systems.

title: Update Subresource Integrity hash values
description: Provides step-by-step instructions for generating and updating SRI hash values in a Salesforce Commerce Cloud cartridge to ensure secure script loading during checkout.
